false_blue_running.summary: RUNNING was promoted by evidence that should remain diagnostic-only.

false_green_done.summary: DONE appeared without a valid verify path.

false_red_blocked.summary: BLOCKED remained active without a valid current blocker.

weak_signal_promoted.summary: Weak runtime evidence was promoted into a stronger UI state.

stale_writer.summary: An old or conflicting projector writer was detected.

fallback_leak.summary: Fallback behavior escaped its intended diagnostic-only boundary.

launch_agent_unhealthy.summary: LaunchAgent or trust surface is not healthy enough for clean acceptance.

signal_bus_pollution.summary: Signal bus contains noisy or conflicting records that reduce confidence.

privacy_boundary_violation.summary: Sensitive-output or auth boundary was violated.
